targets.heading: Targets
targets.subheading: Each target is a perimeter you've been authorized to scan.
targets.empty: No targets yet. Click "New target" to register the first authorized perimeter.
targets.deleteConfirm: Delete this target and all its discovered data?

authCheckbox.title: I am authorized to scan this perimeter.
authCheckbox.body: I have written authorization from the asset owner, or I own these assets, or they are explicit bug-bounty scope. I understand the API will refuse this request without this box checked.
